Short CV

Prof. Ergün Yücel graduated from Ankara University Faculty of Dentistry in 1980. He completed his doctorate education at Gazi University Graduate School of Health Sciences, Department of Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery between 1981-1984. Since 1984, he has worked at Gazi University Faculty of Dentistry, Department of Clinical Sciences. As of February 2024, he has participated in Üsküdar University.
